headline: HII and Applied Intuition Sign Strategic MOU to Advance AI-Defined Warship Capabilities
summary: Companies will advance AI capabilities for both unmanned and manned vesselsNATIONAL HARBOR, Md., April 21, 2026 (GLOBE NEWSWIRE) -- HII (NYSE: HII) and Applied Intuition, Inc., the leading physical AI company, today signed a memorandum of understanding (MOU) at the Sea-Air-Space Exposition 2026 to collaborate on the development and integration of AI-defined capabilities for next-generation naval platforms. headline: HII Accelerates ROMULUS USV Program: Four New ROMULUS Vessels Head into Production
summary: NATIONAL HARBOR, Md., April 21, 2026 (GLOBE NEWSWIRE) -- HII (NYSE: HII), America’s largest military shipbuilder and global leader in autonomous maritime systems, announced today plans for the production of four ROMULUS 151 vessels to be built by Breaux Brothers Enterprises in Louisiana in addition to the ROMULUS 151 currently under construction. The announcement signals a rapid shift toward initial production, as HII pushes to accelerate delivery of autonomous surface capability to the U.S. Nav

headline: Huntington Ingalls Earnings Preview: What to Expect
summary: Huntington Ingalls is scheduled to report its first-quarter results next month, and analysts are projecting a modest, low-single-digit decline in earnings.

headline: HII Links Maritime Framework And AI Automation With Valuation Discount In Focus
summary: Huntington Ingalls Industries (NYSE:HII) unveiled a next generation integrated maritime operations framework at the Sea Air Space Expo. The framework is designed to connect manned and autonomous systems to support more coordinated joint operations for U.S. naval modernization. HII also announced a partnership with GrayMatter Robotics to introduce AI driven automation into its shipbuilding processes. The AI focused collaboration targets higher throughput, more efficient use of the workforce,...
